meta.title: NexaVault | Institutional Digital Asset Infrastructure
meta.description: Digital asset infrastructure for banks, funds, exchanges, and Web3 companies: custody, wallets, settlement, staking, stablecoin issuance, and API orchestration in one auditable control plane.

hero.copy: Digital asset infrastructure for banks, funds, exchanges, and Web3 companies: custody, wallets, settlement, staking, stablecoin issuance, and API orchestration in one auditable control plane.
hero.assets: Simulated assets under custody and settlement
hero.networks: Supported chains, tokens, and fiat corridors
hero.approvalMeta: 2 transfers await Finance and Risk approval

products.title: Asset operations, separated into clear and composable product modules.
products.copy: NexaVault avoids exposing scattered back-office functions and organizes the page around the capabilities institutions actually buy.

items.title: Qualified Custody
items.copy: Cold and hot wallets, MPC key shares, insurance workflows, and audit reports for funds, banks, and public-company treasury teams.

items.title: Wallet Platform
items.copy: Embeddable wallets, withdrawal policies, white-label accounts, and on-chain risk controls for exchanges, payments, and fintech platforms.

items.title: Settlement Network
items.copy: Atomic delivery across OTC desks, market makers, and custody accounts to reduce counterparty exposure and improve capital efficiency.

items.title: Stablecoin Studio
items.copy: Issuance, minting, redemption, reserve reporting, and account compliance for global payments and treasury programs.

security.title: Turn signing, approvals, and risk controls into an automated safety chain.
security.copy: Every asset movement passes through policy, counterparty screening, permission checks, and audit logging before it reaches the signing path.

stats.label: Policy, people, addresses, and on-chain behavior working together

items.title: Layered Authorization
items.copy: Configure approval flows by asset, amount, address, region, and transaction type to reduce manual confirmation and privilege drift.

items.title: Real-time Risk Engine
items.copy: On-chain behavior, sanctions lists, abnormal routes, and counterparty reputation enter the same decision layer before release.

items.title: Auditable Ledger
items.copy: Policy changes, signing actions, transaction states, and report exports produce records for internal controls and external audits.

items.title: Cross-chain Operations
items.copy: Manage public chains, L2s, stablecoins, and tokenized assets from one account view without switching between tools.

developers.title: Embed wallet, settlement, and compliance modules into your product.
developers.copy: Developers can orchestrate account creation, transaction approvals, chain state sync, and report exports through REST APIs, webhooks, and SDKs.

cases.title: Different buying reasons for different types of institutions.
cases.copy: Each scenario can grow into a dedicated detail page; this first release keeps the product story complete on one page.

items.title: Asset Managers and ETF Issuers
items.copy: Custody, subscriptions and redemptions, valuation, audit exports, and multi-team approvals in one workflow.

items.title: Exchanges and Fintech Platforms
items.copy: Connect wallets, deposits, withdrawals, address risk controls, and customer fund segregation through API.

items.title: Corporate Treasury and Stablecoin Teams
items.copy: Operate BTC, ETH, stablecoins, and tokenized assets with policies that keep treasury movement transparent.

workflow.title: Asset operations from onboarding to settlement.

steps.title: Onboard institutional accounts
steps.copy: Set up account structures, permission roles, and asset scope for funds, exchanges, or treasury teams.

steps.title: Configure policy and approvals
steps.copy: Define controls by amount, address, chain, and business type before transactions are released.

steps.title: Execute signing and settlement
steps.copy: Move funds through MPC signing, on-chain routing, and settlement workflows with audit records preserved.

steps.title: Sync reports and audit trails
steps.copy: Share transaction states, approval records, and asset snapshots with finance, risk, and audit teams.

contact.title: Contact the NexaVault product team.
contact.copy: Email us your institution type and target scenario. We will prepare guidance around custody, wallets, settlement, or stablecoin workflows.
contact.emailCopy: Use this address for custody, wallet, settlement, stablecoin, staking, or API integration discussions.

footer.note: Prototype for institutional digital asset infrastructure · 2026
